ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_input" TEXT /* Text input or query entered by the user */,
  "content_url" TEXT /* URL of the content accessed by the user */,
  "number_of_hits" INTEGER /* Number of times the query resulted in a hit (e.g., relevant content found) */,
  "number_of_misses" INTEGER /* Number of times the query resulted in a miss (e.g., no relevant content found) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the interaction */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the interaction (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (city, country) */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., search, view, click) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_content_url FOREIGN KEY ("content_url") REFERENCES content ("content_url"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, content creator, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "notification_token" TEXT /* Token for push notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "content_url" TEXT /* URL of the content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the content was uploaded */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., video, article, tutorial) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the content */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the content */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the content */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes for the content */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the content */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments for the content */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Engagement score based on likes, shares, comments, etc. */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the content for better categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES content_authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the author's social media profiles */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "interaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the user interaction */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content being interacted with */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, click, search) */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the interaction (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_logs_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES user_interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_logs_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the content category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category mapping */,
  "content_id" TEXT /* ID of the content */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "primary_category" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is primary or secondary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_categories_mapping_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_categories_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES content_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_categories" TEXT /* Preferred categories of content */,
  "preferred_content_types" TEXT /* Preferred types of content */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* Notification settings for the user */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Preferred language for content */,
  "content_filter_settings" TEXT /* Settings for content filtering (e.g., safe search, age-appropriate content) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
